title: Cashew Crusted Aussie Chicken
description: A crispy, flavorful chicken dish inspired by Australian cuisine, featuring a crunchy cashew crust and a delicious stir fry sauce.
instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper.
In a food processor, grind cashews until coarsely chopped.
In a shallow dish, mix together flour, ground cashews, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate dish, beat egg.
Dip each chicken breast in the egg, then coat in the cashew mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place coated chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
While chicken is baking, heat stir-fry sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in soy sauce and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
Remove chicken from oven and let rest for 5 minutes.
Slice into strips and serve with stir-fry sauce spooned over the top.
